# v0

> AI Registry entry [AIR-90](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-90/v0) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-05-04. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI App / Website Builder + UI Component Generator (chat-to-app, "vibe coding")
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** Free $0; Team $30/user; Business $100/user (training opt-out default); Enterprise custom (SAML SSO, RBAC, no-training guarantee)
**Departments:** Technology (primary), Marketing, Commercial
**Entity:** Vercel

## Overview

Vercel's chat-to-app and UI-generation product. Origin: UI/component generator (Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Next.js). Now full chat-to-app builder deploying full-stack apps on Vercel. Deepest in cohort on Next.js + Vercel-native workflows.

## Capabilities

* Chat-to-build with screenshot/file/Figma input
* **UI/Component generation** — Tailwind + shadcn/ui React components (cohort strongest)
* Design Mode — visual editing
* Multiple model tiers (v0 Mini / Pro / Max / Max Fast)
* GitHub sync, code editing, versioning
* **One-click deploy to Vercel** with custom domains
* Database integrations + external APIs
* MCP integrations
* iOS app for v0
* **Embeds in IDEs** — Cline, Cursor, OpenAI Codex, Zed
* **Threat-modelled code execution** — sandboxed Vercel Functions runtime, env-var separation

## Security & Compliance

* ✅ **SOC 2 Type 2** (under Vercel attestation: Security, Confidentiality, Availability)
* ✅ **GDPR**
* Vercel Trust Center: security.vercel.com
* **Training opt-out automatic on Business+**
* Enterprise: contractual no-training guarantee + separate-infrastructure isolation
* **Sandboxed code execution** in Vercel Functions; env-var separation
* SAML SSO + RBAC + audit logs on Enterprise
* Approval workflows + private workspaces + version history

## Bakeoff Position

**Strongest UI/component output in cohort.** Tight Vercel/Next.js integration. Embedded in third-party IDEs. Explicit threat-model docs + sandboxed-execution story. Clear plan-tier training-opt-out.

* **Vs Lovable**: Both mature; Lovable has ISO 27001 + multi-region residency; v0 stronger React/Next.js output
* **Vs Hercules**: v0 more compliance-mature
* **Vs Bolt**: v0 clearer compliance + sandboxed execution

**Weakness:** Heavy Next.js + Vercel lock-in; Business at $100/user is highest in cohort.

*Backlog. Functional tier. Strongest fit for Next.js/React + Vercel pipeline.*
